analysis.consistency: High. The spell adheres to standard D&D 5e spell formatting and terminology.
analysis.quality: High. It is a classic, powerful control spell typical of high-level magic.

mechanics.save_mechanic: Constitution saving throw at the end of each of the target's turns to end the effect.
mechanics.notes: The instantaneous duration applies to the casting, but the effect itself persists until the save is made. The effect is binary based on the target's current HP, making it a potent 'alpha strike' against lower-to-mid tier enemies.
